title: Tesla’s Full Self-Driving software is creeping into Europe
summary: Tesla is expanding its Full Self-Driving software across Europe, with deployments now in the Netherlands and Lithuania with additional countries reportedly in the queue. The expansion demonstrates Tesla's confidence in its driver assistance technology and potential market opportunity in European markets. The rollout signals growing acceptance of autonomous driving capabilities in regulated European markets.
content: First came the Netherlands, now it's Lithuania. And more European countries appear to be in the queue for Tesla's driver assistance system.

zh.title: 特斯拉全自动驾驶软件进入欧洲
zh.summary: 特斯拉正在欧洲扩展其全自动驾驶软件,目前已在荷兰和立陶宛部署,据报道还有其他国家排队等待。此举显示特斯拉对其驾驶辅助技术的信心以及在欧洲市场的潜在机遇。这次推出表明了自动驾驶能力在受监管的欧洲市场中获得越来越多的认可。

title: I’ve tested the latest Switch 2 controllers, and this one is the best
summary: Third-party Nintendo Switch 2 controllers, particularly the EasySMX S10, offer superior value and durability compared to Nintendo's $89 Pro Controller, featuring Hall effect or TMR joysticks that resist degradation better. The review identifies multiple affordable third-party options that maintain compatibility across Switch 2, original Switch, and PC platforms. These alternatives provide comparable or better features while costing significantly less than Nintendo's official option.
content:
If you choose to get an extra controller for your Nintendo Switch 2, you can spend a lot — and get a lot in return. Buying Nintendo’s own $89 Switch 2 Pro Controller, for instance, will net you the console’s only wireless controller with a 3.5mm headphone jack for private listening, not to mention great-feeling rumble and a slick design. It’s not perfect, but it’s otherwise the total package in terms of features. 
But it’d be a disservice to you to call it a day there. There are several third-party models that are cheaper, yet don’t make many compromises in terms of features. I’ve spent time testing a handful of these gamepads, and there’s a small batch of models that I think will satisfy most people, with a range of styles, prices, and features.
Every controller I’ve included in this guide is compatible with both the Switch 2 and the original Switch (all of them can remotely wake the Switch 2), as well as PC. Each offering also includes better, longer-lasting joystick technology than you’ll get with Nintendo’s flagship controller; the Switch 2 Pro Controller’s potentiometer-based joysticks are prone to degradation over time, after all, but our picks include either Hall effect or TMR joysticks. I’ve highlighted any controller-specific perks in the blurbs below.
The best Switch 2 controller for most people
EasySMX S10
The EasySMX S10 is our favorite Switch 2 controller for people who don’t want to spend twice as much on Nintendo’s option. It offers an excellent take on HD rumble, along with amiibo support and the ability to wake the Switch remotely. It features a swappable eight-way (circular) D-pad, and can also work with PC, Steam Deck, and mobile devices.


Score: 8

ProsCons


TMR joysticks
amiibo support
Great rumble

Clicky buttons are divisive



Where to Buy:

 $59.99 $49.99 at Amazon (black, for Prime members)
 $59.99 at EasySMX
 $59.99 $50.99 at Amazon (white, for Prime members)

Supported platforms: Nintendo Switch 2, Nintendo Switch, PC, Steam Deck, mobil

zh.title: 我测试了最新的Switch 2控制器,这一款最好
zh.summary: 第三方任天堂Switch 2控制器,特别是EasySMX S10,相比任天堂89美元的Pro控制器提供了更好的性价比和耐用性,采用Hall effect或TMR摇杆具有更好的抗衰减性。评测发现了多个价格实惠的第三方选项,可在Switch 2、原始Switch和PC平台上保持兼容性。这些替代方案提供了相当或更好的功能,同时成本远低于任天堂官方产品。

title: Airbnb gets into hotels, expands AI for host onboarding and customer support
summary: Airbnb is expanding beyond short-term rentals into hotel bookings and adding ancillary services like luggage storage and car rentals to its platform. The company is simultaneously deploying AI tools to streamline host onboarding and enhance customer support capabilities. These moves position Airbnb as a comprehensive travel booking platform competing more broadly in the hospitality space.
content: Airbnb will soon let you book luggage storage and car rental services on its app

zh.title: Airbnb进军酒店业,扩展AI用于房东入职和客户支持
zh.summary: Airbnb正在超越短期租赁市场,扩展到酒店预订,并在其平台上增加行李存储和汽车租赁等辅助服务。该公司同时部署AI工具来简化房东入职流程并增强客户支持能力。这些举措将Airbnb定位为一个综合性旅游预订平台,在酒店业更广泛地竞争。

title: Anthropic and OpenAI take their beef to the midterm elections
summary: Anthropic and OpenAI are escalating their rivalry into political lobbying and regulatory advocacy ahead of the midterm elections, with both companies investing in Washington influence. The competitive engagement reflects the strategic importance of policy and regulatory decisions shaping the AI industry's future. The companies' political involvement demonstrates how AI's significance extends beyond business competition into governance and legislation.
content:
Hello and welcome to Regulator, a newsletter for Verge subscribers about the car crashes piling up on a daily basis at the Washington-based intersection of technology and politics. If you're not a subscriber, sign up for our fine editorial enterprise today, especially as we process the end of Musk v. Altman. And if you have any tips about impending or hidden Washington car crashes, send 'em over to tina.nguyen+tips@theverge.com. 
A quick note: Regulator will be on hiatus for the next two weeks while I take a much-needed vacation. Unfortunately, this means I'll be missing the public release of Pope Leo XIV's encyclical on humanity in the age …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Anthropic和OpenAI的竞争扩展到中期选举政治
zh.summary: Anthropic和OpenAI正在升级彼此之间的竞争，扩展到政治游说和监管倡导，两家公司在中期选举前争相在华盛顿获得影响力。这种竞争反映了政策和监管决策在塑造人工智能产业未来中的战略重要性。两家公司的政治参与表明人工智能的重要性已经超越商业竞争，涉及治理和立法领域。

title: Vibe coding is coming to your phone
summary: AI-powered "vibe coding" tools are democratizing app development by enabling non-programmers to create mobile applications through natural language descriptions instead of traditional coding. This emerging technology promises to make custom app creation accessible to mainstream consumers and reshape smartphone usage patterns. The trend reflects AI's expanding role in lowering technical barriers to software development.
content:
Coming to your homescreen soon: your own app. | Photo: Allison Johnson / The Verge	

"There's an app for that" was the promise of the App Store from the very beginning. The app that will get your phone to do the thing you want it to? It's just a few taps away. The tagline wasn't strictly true - I'm still waiting for that one perfect grocery list app. Still, apps shaped the modern smartphone into what it is today. We spend all day, every day inside of apps - scrolling, listening, and tapping until we find what we want. But your next favorite app might just be one that you made yourself.
If you weren't familiar with the concept of "vibe coding" at the beginning of 2026, you probably are now. As AI coding tools have become bet …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Vibe编码即将登陆你的手机
zh.summary: 由人工智能驱动的"Vibe编码"工具正在使应用开发民主化，让非程序员能够通过自然语言描述而不是传统编码来创建移动应用。这项新兴技术承诺将定制应用开发变得对主流消费者可访问，并重塑智能手机的使用方式。这一趋势反映了人工智能在降低软件开发技术壁垒中日益扩大的作用。

title: Global EV market goes K-shaped as the U.S. gets left behind
summary: Global EV sales are surging in most world regions while the U.S. market stagnates, creating a divergent K-shaped growth pattern that disadvantages American automotive manufacturers. This disparity reflects policy differences and market conditions favoring EV adoption outside the U.S., leaving domestic automakers facing competitive headwinds. The trend poses strategic risks for both legacy carmakers and startups attempting to compete globally.
content: EV sales have surged worldwide in every region but the U.S., posing risks for legacy and startup automakers.

zh.title: 全球电动车市场呈K型分化，美国市场掉队
zh.summary: 全球大多数地区的电动汽车销售激增，而美国市场停滞，形成了对美国汽车制造商不利的分化K型增长模式。这种差异反映了政策和市场条件对美国以外电动汽车采用的有利影响，使国内汽车制造商面临竞争压力。这一趋势对试图在全球竞争的传统汽车制造商和初创公司都构成了战略风险。

title: Buckle up: Google is set to remake search with agentic AI in 2026
summary: Google is planning a major overhaul of its search engine using agentic AI systems, with significant announcements at its I/O 2026 conference. The shift toward AI-driven search represents a fundamental evolution in information delivery and directly addresses competition from AI chatbot platforms. This move could reshape how users interact with search and compete with emerging AI-native competitors.
content: Google's AI search evolution is accelerating at I/O 2026.

zh.title: 做好准备：谷歌计划在2026年用代理AI重塑搜索
zh.summary: 谷歌计划使用代理AI系统对其搜索引擎进行重大改革，并在2026年I/O大会上做出重要宣布。向AI驱动搜索的转变代表了信息传递的根本性演进，直接应对来自AI聊天机器人平台的竞争。这一举措可能会改变用户与搜索的互动方式，并与新兴的AI原生竞争对手竞争。

title: Volvo is trying to put its EV stumbles in the rearview
summary: Volvo is recovering from significant EV setbacks including persistent software bugs in the EX90 and tariff-related discontinuation of its affordable EX30 model in the U.S. market. The Swedish automaker's ambitious goal to fully exit gas car production has given way to a more cautious EV strategy with only the EX40 achieving consistent market success. The company's struggles highlight broader challenges facing traditional automakers in EV transition.
content:
Volvo once had ambitions to fully exit the gas car business. Now it's trying to keep its tenuous foothold in the EV market. 
It's not an understatement to say that Volvo's EV journey has been a bumpy one. The compact EX40 has been a consistent winner, but the Swedish brand's other EVs have been plagued with problems. The EX90 was supposed to be a bold statement for the future, but persistent software bugs have forced Volvo into an expensive hardware replacement. The tiny EX30 faired no better, with tariffs upending the rollout of the brand's first mass-market affordable EV, eventually leading to its discontinuation in the US. 
But now with …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 沃尔沃努力将其电动汽车挫折抛诸脑后
zh.summary: 沃尔沃正在从重大电动汽车挫折中恢复，包括EX90中持续存在的软件漏洞和EX30平价车型因关税而在美国市场中断生产。这家瑞典汽车制造商完全放弃汽油车生产的雄心壮志已让步于更谨慎的电动汽车战略，只有EX40实现了持续的市场成功。该公司的困境突出了传统汽车制造商在电动汽车转型中面临的更广泛挑战。

title: OpenAI barrels towards IPO that may happen in September
summary: OpenAI is reportedly accelerating preparations for an IPO potentially scheduled for September, following the resolution of Elon Musk's legal challenge against the company. The lawsuit's conclusion removes a significant structural and financial obstacle to the company's public market debut. The IPO would mark a major milestone and potentially reshape OpenAI's governance and investor structure.
content: A day after Elon Musk lost his lawsuit that threatened OpenAI's structure, leadership and finances, OpenAI is reportedly back to prepping for its IPO.

zh.title: OpenAI迅速推进可能在9月进行的首次公开募股
zh.summary: 据报道，在埃隆·马斯克对该公司的法律诉讼解决后，OpenAI正在加快IPO准备工作，IPO可能在9月进行。诉讼的结束消除了公司公开市场首次亮相的重大结构和财务障碍。IPO将成为一个重要里程碑，可能会重塑OpenAI的治理和投资者结构。

title: Jeff Bezos, you were so close to making a good point
summary: Jeff Bezos highlighted tax fairness concerns by questioning why a middle-income nurse earning $75,000 annually pays over $1,000 monthly in taxes. His comment contributes to ongoing debate about tax policy, wage adequacy, and wealth distribution in the United States. The statement reflects broader political discourse surrounding taxation and economic burdens on essential workers.
content: "Why is a nurse in Queens who makes $75,000 a year paying more than $1,000 a month in taxes?" Bezos said Wednesday morning on CNBC. "That's $1,000 that could help with rent, or groceries, or anything."

zh.title: 杰夫·贝索斯，你差点就说对了
zh.summary: 杰夫·贝索斯通过质疑为什么年收入75,000美元的中产护士每月需支付超过1,000美元的税款，突出了税收公平性问题。他的评论推动了关于美国税收政策、工资充分性和财富分配的持续辩论。该言论反映了围绕税收和对基层工作者经济负担的更广泛政治讨论。

title: You can now remix other people’s YouTube Shorts with AI
summary: Google has launched YouTube Shorts Remix, powered by Gemini AI, allowing users to creatively modify other creators' videos by applying art styles, inserting subjects into clips, and making visual alterations. Creators retain control by choosing whether to allow remixing of their content. The feature expands AI's creative applications while maintaining creator agency over their intellectual property.
content:
Google announced a new YouTube Shorts Remix feature that lets users restyle clips or even insert themselves into other people's videos using Gemini Omni. Now, at the bottom of a YouTube Short, when you click the remix icon, you'll see an option to "reimagine" it. Here, you can prompt Gemini to turn a video into pixel art, an anime, or a found-footage horror film. But, beyond that, you can also alter the contents by, say, inflating heads, inserting background actors, dressing people in pirate costumes, or even putting yourself in the clip.
Creators can enable or disable the ability to reimagine videos. So, if you upload a short of your kids  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 你现在可以用AI重新混编他人的YouTube Shorts
zh.summary: 谷歌推出了由Gemini AI驱动的YouTube Shorts Remix功能，允许用户通过应用艺术风格、在视频中插入主体和进行视觉修改来创意地改变其他创作者的视频。创作者可以选择是否允许对其内容进行混编，从而保持对内容的控制权。该功能扩展了AI在创意应用中的范围，同时维护了创作者对其知识产权的代理权。

title: Xbox hires game industry analyst Matthew Ball to lead strategy
summary: Microsoft has appointed renowned game industry analyst Matthew Ball as Xbox's new chief strategy officer, bringing expertise from Amazon Studios and media leadership roles. Ball is widely respected for his annual state of gaming reports and strategic insights across the gaming industry. His appointment reflects Xbox's strategic focus on competitive positioning in the evolving video game market.
content:
Microsoft has recruited game industry analyst Matthew Ball as Xbox chief strategy officer. Ball publishes an annual state of video gaming report, which is a popular read across the game industry, and he's "widely respected across gaming, media, and technology," according to Xbox CEO Asha Sharma.
Sharma announced Ball is joining Microsoft in a memo to Xbox employees this morning, seen by The Verge. She described Ball as a "longtime gamer," who has held strategy and leadership roles at Illumination, Amazon Studios, Otter Media, and Accenture Strategy. "Matthew has been partnering with us on strategy since day 10 and will officially start this …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Xbox聘请游戏业分析师马修·鲍尔担任战略负责人
zh.summary: 微软任命享有盛誉的游戏业分析师马修·鲍尔为Xbox新任首席战略官，他拥有来自亚马逊影业和媒体领导职位的专业经验。鲍尔因其年度游戏状况报告和对整个游戏行业的战略洞察而广为人知。他的任命反映了Xbox在不断演变的视频游戏市场中的竞争战略定位。

title: Google Search’s AI evolution includes more ads
summary: Google is integrating AI-powered advertisements into its search results through Gemini AI generating custom product recommendations and explanations for sponsored products. The update monetizes Google's shift toward conversational and agentic search while expanding advertising opportunities in search results. The strategy combines AI advancement with advertising revenue generation as Google competes with emerging AI search alternatives.
content:
Some ads will have chatbots built in. | Image: Google	

Google's AI-powered Search era apparently also extends to its ads. Now, when you look for a product in Search, Google's Gemini AI model will surface relevant items and generate a "custom explainer" about why you should purchase a specific one.
The update comes just one day after Google revealed a new Search box for larger, more conversational queries, along with a focus on AI-generated results. In an example shared by Google, someone searching for a "compact espresso pod machine" might see a Nespresso Vertuo Up under a "Sponsored Product" label, alongside an AI-generated description saying: 
For a quality machine, look for capsule compati …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌搜索的AI演进包含更多广告
zh.summary: 谷歌通过Gemini AI在其搜索结果中整合AI驱动的广告,为赞助产品生成定制的产品推荐和说明。该更新在谷歌向对话式和代理搜索转变的同时实现盈利,同时扩大了搜索结果中的广告机会。该策略将AI进步与广告收入生成相结合,以在与新兴AI搜索替代品的竞争中保持优势。

title: Anker’s travel-friendly Laptop Power Bank has returned to its best price of the year
summary: Anker's 25,000mAh Laptop Power Bank is currently available at its best price of the year ($95.99) across major retailers, offering robust multi-port charging for travelers. The device delivers up to 100W from a single USB-C port and supports simultaneous charging of up to four devices with airline carry-on compliance. Its compact design makes it an ideal portable power solution for frequent travelers.
content:
Whether you’re heading out for a quick Memorial Day getaway or preparing for summer travel, a reliable power bank can come in handy when there’s no outlet in sight. Fortunately, Anker’s Laptop Power Bank can keep all your essential gadgets charged, and it’s currently on sale at Amazon, Best Buy, and Walmart for $95.99 ($24 off), which is the best price we’ve seen this year and the lowest since Black Friday.
Anker Laptop Power Bank

Where to Buy:

 $119.99 $95.99 at Amazon
 $119.99 $95.99 at Walmart
 $119.99 $95.99 at Best Buy

Despite weighing as much as a water bottle, the 25,000mAh / 90Wh power bank can charge up to four devices at once via three USB-C ports and a lone USB-A port, so you won’t need to pack multiple chargers. It also meets airline carry-on requirements and features a retractable 2.3-foot USB-C cable, along with a second USB-C cable that conveniently doubles as a carrying strap, so you have fewer accessories to worry about when packing.
What really makes it stand out, though, is its power. It delivers up to 100W from a single USB-C port, meaning it can quickly charge beefy laptops, including Apple’s M5-powered MacBook Pro. It can also deliver up to 165W when charging two USB-C devices simultaneously, or 130W when using all four ports, allowing you to quickly top off your electronics when you’re short on time. As a nice extra, it also features a real-time display, which makes it easy to see how much battery remains and whether your devices are actually charging at full speed.

zh.title: Anker便携式笔记本电源已回到年度最低价
zh.summary: Anker的25,000mAh笔记本电源银行目前以今年最低价($95.99)在各大零售商处供应,为旅行者提供强劲的多端口充电。该设备单个USB-C端口可提供高达100W的功率,支持同时为最多四台设备充电且符合航空公司随身行李规定。其紧凑设计使其成为经常出差者理想的便携式电源解决方案。

title: Customers say Trump Mobile is leaking their personal information
summary: Trump Mobile customers reported a significant data breach exposing email addresses and home addresses, with the company failing to respond to security alerts. Independent researchers verified the exposure, raising serious privacy concerns for affected customers. The incident highlights security vulnerabilities at emerging mobile carriers and inadequate incident response protocols.
content: Trump Mobile is leaking customers’ email and home addresses but has not responded to people alerting the company of the data exposure, according to two YouTubers who said they verified that their leaked data is authentic.

zh.title: 客户声称Trump Mobile正泄露其个人信息
zh.summary: Trump Mobile客户报告发生重大数据泄露事件,导致电子邮件地址和家庭地址被暴露,该公司未能对安全警报做出回应。独立研究人员证实了这一泄露,引发了对受影响客户隐私的严重担忧。该事件暴露了新兴移动运营商的安全漏洞和不足的事件应对协议。

title: Figma adds an AI assistant to its collaborative canvas
summary: Figma is launching an AI assistant on its Design platform, expanding AI capabilities in collaborative design tools. This reflects the broader industry trend of integrating AI into creative workflows.
content: Figma's new AI assistant will be first available on Figma Design

zh.title: Figma 为协作画布增加 AI 助手
zh.summary: Figma 正在其设计平台推出 AI 助手,扩展协作设计工具的 AI 能力。这反映了在创意工作流中集成 AI 的更广泛行业趋势。

title: Quartermaster is building a maritime hive mind
summary: Arlington-based startup Quartermaster has raised $42 million to equip ships with advanced sensors that improve upon current AIS tracking technology. The innovation aims to enhance maritime coordination and safety capabilities.
content: The Arlington, Virginia-based startup has raised $42 million to equip ships with sensors that blow the current AIS tech out of the water.

zh.title: Quartermaster 正在打造海事群体智能
zh.summary: 总部位于阿灵顿的初创公司 Quartermaster 融资 4200 万美元,为船舶配备先进传感器,改进现有 AIS 追踪技术。该创新旨在增强海上协调和安全能力。

title: The biggest data center ever is becoming a huge problem in Utah
summary: Box Elder County approved the Stratos Project, a 40,000-acre data center in Utah's Hansel Valley that would consume 9GW of power and double the state's peak electricity usage. The facility, backed by venture capitalist Kevin O'Leary, aims to establish American AI dominance but faces fierce opposition over environmental damage and severe water supply strain.
content:
Utah may host one of the world's most colossal data centers, despite stark warnings from experts and fierce public backlash. Earlier this month, commissioners in Box Elder County signed off on the Stratos Project: a 40,000-acre data center stretching across the county's Hansel Valley. It's supposed to establish American AI dominance, but potentially at the expense of environmental damage and a strain on already overtaxed water supplies.
The Stratos Project, backed by Shark Tank investor and venture capitalist Kevin O'Leary, is projected to be more than twice the size of Manhattan and consume 9GW of power - almost double the state's peak ele …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 有史以来最大的数据中心正成为犹他州的大问题
zh.summary: 博克斯埃尔德县批准了斯特拉托斯项目,这是位于犹他州汉塞尔谷的一个 40,000 英亩数据中心,将消耗 9GW 电力,使该州峰值用电量翻倍。该设施由风险投资家凯文·奥莱里支持,旨在建立美国 AI 优势,但因环保问题和严重缺水而面临强烈反对。

title: ‘It’s in the air’: Apple TV’s hottest new shows explore different sides of OnlyFans
summary: Apple TV is exploring the creator economy with two shows about OnlyFans creators and cam models: "Margo's Got Money Troubles" and "Maximum Pleasure Guaranteed." The timing reflects growing mainstream acceptance of creator-focused content.
content:
Margo’s Got Money Troubles. | Image: Apple	

Apple TV is best known for its lineup of science fiction shows and feel-good sitcoms, but of late the streaming service has veered in a different direction. A pair of its current buzziest shows explore the world of OnlyFans creators and cam models, and they're timed up near perfectly; just as one ends (Margo's Got Money Troubles) another is set to begin (Maximum Pleasure Guaranteed). According to Maximum Pleasure Guaranteed creator and showrunner David J. Rosen, the timing is something of a coincidence, but also indicative of the current moment. "I think it's in the air," he says. "There's just more and more acceptance of finding companionsh …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: "势在必行": Apple TV热播新剧从多个角度探讨OnlyFans
zh.summary: Apple TV通过两部新剧探索创作者经济，分别讲述OnlyFans创作者和直播模特的故事："玛戈的金钱烦恼"和"终极快乐保证"。这一时机反映了主流文化对创作者内容的日益接纳。

title: Android 17 is getting its own version of Apple’s Handoff
summary: Google is introducing "Continue On," a feature similar to Apple's Handoff that allows users to start tasks on their Android phone and resume on a compatible tablet. At launch, the feature will only support phone-to-tablet transitions.
content:
At launch, Continue On will only allow you to move tasks from a phone to a tablet. | Image: Google	

Google is adding a new Android feature that resembles Apple's Handoff, allowing you to start a task on your Android phone and continue it right where you left off from a compatible tablet. 
"Continue On" is designed to eventually be bidirectional, but Google says that at launch it will only support tasks moving from a smartphone to a tablet. Android tablet users will see the Continue On icon in the dock suggesting the most recently used app from their phone, assuming it's also installed on the tablet.
It should allow Android users to directly open documents they were working on, or jump straight into the email they just had open. In some c …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Android 17推出自己的Apple接力功能版本
zh.summary: Google推出了"继续使用"功能，类似于Apple的接力功能，让用户可以在Android手机上开始任务，然后在兼容平板电脑上继续。在推出初期，该功能仅支持手机到平板电脑的转换。

title: The Internet can't stop watching Figure AI's humanoid robots handling packages
summary: Figure AI is running a 24/7 livestream showcasing its humanoid robots handling packages, demonstrating strong public fascination with advanced robotics. The viral appeal highlights consumer interest in witnessing robotics capabilities in real-world applications.
content: Figure AI's 24/7 livestream showcases human soft spot for humanoid robots.

zh.title: 网络为Figure AI的人形机器人搬运包裹的表现着迷不已
zh.summary: Figure AI运营一场24小时直播，展示其人形机器人搬运包裹的过程，彰显了公众对先进机器人技术的浓厚兴趣。这种病毒式的热度反映了消费者渴望亲眼看到机器人在现实应用中的能力。

title: Samsung workers set to strike at worst possible time
summary: More than 47,000 Samsung Electronics workers are scheduled to strike for 18 days starting Thursday over failed bonus negotiations, affecting domestic chipmaking plants. The timing is particularly critical given the ongoing global shortage in memory chip production.
content:
Samsung Electronics workers attended a rally outside the company's semiconductor plant in Pyeongtaek on April 23rd, ahead of the planned strike. | Photo by SeongJoon Cho/Bloomberg via Getty Images	

More than 47,000 Samsung Electronics workers are gearing up for an 18-day strike after bonus payment negotiations between the company and its union collapsed. The strike is set to start on Thursday and will be limited to Samsung's domestic chipmaking plants, raising concerns around the already constrained production of memory chips amid the ongoing shortage.
While the union had agreed to mediation proposed by South Korea's National Labor Relations Commission (the details of which have not been made public), management at Samsung Electronics rejected the deal without explanation, Nikkei Asia reports.
As part of its demands, the Samsung unio …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 三星员工在最坏的时机准备罢工
zh.summary: 超过47000名三星电子员工定于周四起开始罢工18天，原因是奖金谈判失败，将影响国内芯片制造工厂。鉴于当前全球内存芯片生产短缺，这个时机特别关键。

title: Moose-proof and megacasting: Ars drives the new Volvo EX60
summary: Volvo is launching the EX60 electric vehicle with improved manufacturing efficiency and advanced production techniques like megacasting. The model showcases Volvo's competitive focus on production innovation and modern technology.
content: Volvo is coming for its competitors with more efficient production and newer tech.

zh.title: 驼鹿防护和巨型铸造：Ars试驾全新沃尔沃EX60
zh.summary: 沃尔沃推出EX60电动汽车，具有改进的制造效率和先进的生产技术（如巨型铸造）。该车型展示了沃尔沃对生产创新和现代技术的竞争焦点。

title: ‘Ask YouTube’ brings AI-powered conversational search to video, adds Gemini Omni to Shorts
summary: Google introduces 'Ask YouTube,' an AI-powered conversational search tool that lets users interact with video content through natural language queries. The feature also brings Gemini Omni to YouTube Shorts, extending Google's AI integration across its video platform.
content: Google is completely revamping its search experience, and that doesn't stop at YouTube.

zh.title: "Ask YouTube"为视频带来AI驱动的对话式搜索，为Shorts添加Gemini Omni
zh.summary: Google推出"Ask YouTube"，这是一个AI驱动的对话式搜索工具，让用户能通过自然语言查询与视频内容互动。该功能还为YouTube Shorts带来了Gemini Omni，扩展了Google在其视频平台上的AI整合。

title: Mercedes’ electric AMG GT 4-door coupe can go 0-60 in 2 seconds
summary: Mercedes unveiled its new AMG GT 4-door electric coupe sedan, capable of accelerating from 0-60 mph in just 2 seconds. The ultra-high-performance EV features three axial flux motors delivering 1,153 horsepower, positioning it to compete with hypercars.
content:
The era of ultra-high performance Mercedes EVs is here. The German automaker finally revealed its new super sedan, the AMG GT 4-door coupe, with technology borrowed from the automaker's XX concept that last year made history by driving 24,901 miles in under 8 days at Nardò Ring in southern Italy. 
With the production model, Mercedes rethought its approach to motors and batteries in the hopes of delivering a high performance vehicle that could go toe-to-toe with even some hypercars. The new AMG GT utilizes three axial flux motors developed by Mercedes subsidiary YASA, delivering up to 1,153 horsepower and 1,475 lb-ft of torque. Mercedes clai …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 梅赛德斯电动AMG GT四门轿跑车0-60加速仅需2秒
zh.summary: 梅赛德斯推出新款AMG GT四门电动轿跑车，可在2秒内从0-60 mph加速。这款超高性能电动车配备三个轴向通量马达，输出功率达1,153马力，使其能与超跑相竞争。
